scripts.docs:generate: leadtype generate --src ../../.docs-src/c15t --docs-dir docs --out public --base-url http://localhost:3000 --name c15t --summary "Consent management for modern web apps."
scripts.dev: bun run --filter leadtype build && bun run docs:generate && PORTLESS_PORT=443 PORTLESS_HTTPS=1 portless fumadocs -- next dev --webpack
scripts.build: bun run --filter leadtype build && bun run docs:generate && next build --webpack
scripts.check-types: bun run --filter leadtype build && bun run setup:source && bun run docs:generate && tsgo --noEmit
